title: 'So many things wrong with this:' Trump admin vet on Russia prisoner claim
shortDescription: Donald Trump's own former advisors say he undermined national security by claiming Vladimir Putin would release Evan Gershkovich if Trump wins

title: Video shows Biden had chair to sit in at D-Day ceremony | Fact check
shortDescription: A video from a D-Day ceremony in France was edited to make it appear Biden was trying to sit without a chair behind him.

title: Trump judge flags social media post from supposed juror's cousin
shortDescription: The judge, Juan Merchan, flags a post to court's Facebook page purportedly from May 29, two days before jury verdict convicting former president

title: After week of Hunter Biden trial testimony, what's next for the case?
shortDescription: Prosecutors rested their felony gun case against the president's son as the defense called Naomi Biden to the witness stand.

title: Who is Neilia Biden? Hunter Biden's mother was 'the brains' behind Joe
shortDescription: Hunter Biden's mother, Neilia Hunter Biden, died in a car crash in 1972 at age 30. Here is the role she played in the Biden family.

title: Virginia GOP governor doubles down on 2024 swing-state aspirations
shortDescription: The Trump campaign has yet to invest heavily in Virginia but money, manpower and energy are coming soon to Virginia, GOP Chair Rich Anderson said.

title: After D-Day events in France, Biden turns gaze to wars in Ukraine and Gaza
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is facing a steep climb as he turns his attention from D-Day commemorations to conflicts in Gaza and Ukraine at the G7 Summit.

title: Down-ballot races to watch: State Supreme Court seats
shortDescription: State Supreme Court elections may not be at the top of your ticket this November, but they could influence important policy going forward.

title: Appeals panel for Donald Trump's case not yet determined | Fact check
shortDescription: The Black women seen in a viral photo are among 21 justices at a New York appellate court. If Trump appeals, any of those 21 could hear his case.

title: Joe Biden said he won't pardon son if he is convicted in gun trial
shortDescription: President Joe Biden reiterated his stance in a new interview Thursday that he would not pardon his son if he is convicted in his felony gun trial.

title: No evidence for conspiracy theory that Biden is behind Trump charges
shortDescription: Trump accused Biden of playing a role in his prosecution in New York. Experts say Biden doesn't have that power – and there's no proof he's involved.

title: Eleven sent to Phoenix hospital at Trump rally
shortDescription: Thousands of people showed up in Phoenix, Arizona to support former president Donald Trump, with 11 going to the hospital due to the extreme heat.

title: Biden on D-Day anniversary: 'Let us be worthy of their sacrifice'
shortDescription: President Biden talked of Ukraine on the anniversary of D-Day. The latest on former President Trump's search for a VP. These and more on The Excerpt.

title: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu to address Congress on July 24
shortDescription: This will be Netanyahu's fourth speech to a joint session of Congress, the most times for a foreign leader and breaking a tie with Winston Churchill.

title: In record heat, Trump fans flock to see him in AZ after felony conviction
shortDescription: Thousands turned out to support the former president. At least 11 were taken to hospitals with heat-related issues, Fire Department officials said.

title: Meet the GM retiree, trash picker who found Hunter Biden's gun
shortDescription: A Delaware man with a trash-picking pastime found himself at the center of a national drama testifying at the trial of the president's son.

title: Hunter Biden trial recap: Naomi Biden testifies in father's defense
shortDescription: Hunter Biden's eldest child Naomi Biden took the stand for the defense after the prosecution rested its case in the politically fraught gun trial.

title: Will Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg seek higher post after convicting Trump?
shortDescription: Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg beat Donald Trump in court, making him a rising star among Democrats. Will he follow past NY prosecutors to higher office?

title: George Clooney called White House over wife's legal work on Gaza, report says
shortDescription: The Washington Post reported Clooney was concerned after President Biden attacked the International Criminal Court, which Amal Clooney had assisted.

title: Trump aide Steve Bannon ordered to prison
shortDescription: Former Donald Trump's aide Steve Bannon was ordered to prison to serve time after his appeal on his contempt of Congress conviction failed.
